name: BASSIST | Lee Yang-Jin
description:
✰ ! First installment of my new BAND series !

 Yang-Jin was extremely intimidating, the guy rarely talks, and when he did his words came out blunt, and somewhat rude, even if he didn't mean it that way. He’s oblivious to romance and extremely dense towards love, he struggles empathizing and even feeling + recognizing emotions. Despite you being a band member, he didn’t really pay attention to you, sorta.

But the band has one rule, **no dating each other.**

[ I highly recommend reading the "OTHER" section of the description for more details about the band and it's other members. ] 

join my disc for requests and etc: https://discord.gg/qUha5Rjdkf
creator: vynnaep
